title: Focal Points
scenario: Create a visual description of a pair of glasses for a lifestyle brand targeting urban professionals. The description should highlight the stylish frames, high-quality lenses, and the brand's commitment to sustainability. The output should be a 150-word paragraph focused on the product's design and eco-friendliness.
constraints: Must include at least 2 specific features of the glasses

evaluationCriteria.description: The tone of the description should be modern, sophisticated, and appealing to the target audience.
The output should meet the specified constraints: under 150 words, active voice, and at least 2 specific features of the glasses.
The output should accurately convey the brand's commitment to sustainability and highlight the stylish frames and high-quality lenses.
